name: Squarespace
description: Website and commerce platform with REST Commerce APIs to manage products, orders, customers, inventory and more.

auth_methods.note: Official docs state 'The Commerce APIs use OAuth and Developer API Keys' and require an Authorization: Bearer <token> header.

credential_access.note: Docs show Developer API Keys are created from the site dashboard (Settings > Advanced > Developer API Keys), but the documentation does not state whether obtaining working API credentials requires a paid plan, trial, or partner approval—public docs do not state plan/approval constraints.

api_surface.note: Commerce APIs docs state 'The Commerce APIs are REST APIs' and list endpoints for products, orders, customers, fulfillment, subscriptions, inventory, etc.

buildability.note: Requires access to a Squarespace site/account to create Developer API Keys from the site dashboard (Settings > Advanced > Developer API Keys). Public docs do not state whether a paid plan or partner approval is required.

queries: Squarespace developer API documentation site:developers.squarespace.com API authentication how to obtain API credentials Squarespace REST API developer docs
site:developers.squarespace.com "pricing" "Commerce APIs" "plan" "partner" Squarespace API access requires partner
